label: Foundation
goal: Get the infrastructure right. Nothing launches on a broken foundation.

label: Launch

label: Community
goal: Community established. Recurring revenue floor solid. Nashville AI Collective launched.

items.text: Nashville AI Collective — first convening event held
First quarterly ticketed training event in Nashville
Builders Society hitting target MRR
Rock Castle — 1 active high-ticket client ($100K+/yr)

label: Amplify
goal: Scale what's working. Speaking, podcasts, ad scale, OTT planning.

items.text: Speaking — 2+ paid corporate or conference bookings
Podcast guesting — 5+ appearances on relevant shows
Ad spend scaled on highest-performing content
Rock Castle — 2 active high-ticket clients
OTT/streaming strategy defined
$1M annual revenue run rate achieved
